tasks.title: Add structured request-id logging middleware
tasks.prompt: Add request-id middleware to the existing HTTP server and thread the request id into structured logs without breaking current handlers.
acceptance_criteria: request id is attached to incoming requests

tasks.title: Add explicit retry telemetry to an async worker
tasks.prompt: Extend an existing TypeScript worker flow to emit retry telemetry without regressing current behavior.
acceptance_criteria: retry telemetry is emitted on retry paths

tasks.title: Add graceful shutdown logging to worker service
tasks.prompt: Extend an existing Go worker service so graceful shutdown emits structured progress logging and does not regress existing worker behavior.
acceptance_criteria: shutdown path emits structured log markers
tests verify the new shutdown behavior

tasks.title: Add explicit cancellation tracing to async tasks
tasks.prompt: Extend an existing TypeScript async task flow to emit explicit cancellation tracing without changing success-path semantics.

tasks.title: Fix stale timeout propagation in CLI path
tasks.prompt: Identify and fix a timeout propagation bug in an existing Go CLI/runtime path, then verify the regression with tests.
acceptance_criteria: regression test is added or updated

tasks.title: Fix a flaky watcher regression
tasks.prompt: Find and fix a flaky file-watcher regression in an existing TypeScript project and verify the fix with targeted tests.
acceptance_criteria: the fix is validated by tests

tasks.title: Fix configuration reload regression
tasks.prompt: Identify and fix a configuration reload regression in a Go service and verify the fix with targeted regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: regression test captures the bad behavior
reloaded configuration behaves correctly after the fix
